translations.01KQXQV12CG883XGA6VEGEVD2K: 安装 Warp 扩展可在此会话中启用 Agent 功能，例如文件浏览、Code Review 以及智能命令补全。
translations.01KQXQV12J9SB3194K9R77W7FF: 您仍会获得 Warpified 体验，只是没有编码相关功能。

notes: Batch G (63 entries). buttons.rs / gutter_button.rs / local_code_editor.rs / available_shells.rs / ssh_remote_server_choice_view.rs / external_editor/settings.rs all UI tooltips/labels/descriptions — translated. macros.rs lines 245/247/758/759 are /// doc comments captured inside macro body → extractor_false_positive_doc_comment. macros.rs lines 257/875/894/913/930 flow into log::debug / anyhow! errors that only bubble to log (no UI surfacing) → telemetry_payload. winit/delegate.rs: 'Choose directory...'/'Choose file...'/'Save file as...' are native_dialog titles shown to user → translated (ASCII '...' → '……'). 'File Picker'/'Save File Picker' are thread::Builder::name() — debugger/log only → telemetry_payload. 'Error creating ... clipboard'/'Error creating global hotkey handler'/'Unable to open path' → log::error/warn → telemetry_payload. 'Invalid path encoding' surfaces in DismissibleToast via FilePickerError Display → translated. header.rs Heading 1-6 are UI labels for heading level menu — translated. 'Missing file_id' from local_code_editor.rs:2113 flows only to log::error (caller shows hardcoded toast that doesn't include the error string) → telemetry_payload. No search_terms entries in this batch. Brand literals preserved: Warp, Agent, Code Review, MCP, SSH, Docker, PowerShell, Markdown, Windows Subsystem for Linux.
